---
title: "Root Finding"
listing:
  contents:
    - bisection-method/index.qmd
    - fixed-point/index.qmd
    - newton/index.qmd
  type: grid
  sort: false
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Dhruv Azad. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Dhruv Azad
-->

Root finding methods are numerical techniques for solving equations of the form $f(x)=0$.
These methods are central in computational mathematics because many problems cannot be solved exactly with algebra alone.
